use_cases.name: AlphaSignal AI Trader
use_cases.description: AI-powered stock trading signal generator. Analyzes SEC filings, earnings calls, and market microstructure to produce buy/sell signals with confidence scores.

use_cases.name: SentimentPulse News
use_cases.description: Real-time news sentiment analyzer for stocks. Aggregates Reuters, Bloomberg, CNBC, and financial Twitter to produce per-ticker sentiment scores and momentum shifts.

use_cases.name: WhaleTrader Insider Flow
use_cases.description: Tracks SEC Form 4 insider transactions, 13F institutional holdings, and unusual options activity. Identifies smart money patterns and follows big-time holders.

use_cases.name: RedditPulse Stock Radar
use_cases.description: Monitors r/wallstreetbets, r/stocks, r/investing, and r/options for ticker mentions, sentiment shifts, and emerging meme stock momentum using NLP.

use_cases.name: QuantEdge Backtester
use_cases.description: Quantitative strategy backtesting platform with AI optimization. Supports custom indicators, walk-forward analysis, and Monte Carlo simulation for strategy validation.

use_cases.name: FinTwitter Trend Tracker
use_cases.description: Financial Twitter (FinTwit) sentiment aggregator. Tracks influential accounts, trending cashtags, and narrative shifts. Identifies consensus trades and crowded positions.

use_cases.name: EarningsWhisper AI
use_cases.description: AI earnings prediction engine. Analyzes historical surprises, guidance language, supply chain data, and alternative data sources to predict earnings beats/misses.

use_cases.name: FlowVision Options
use_cases.description: Options flow analysis with AI pattern recognition. Detects unusual options activity, dark pool prints, and gamma exposure levels to predict short-term price movements.

use_cases.name: MacroLens Economic
use_cases.description: Macroeconomic data dashboard with Fed rate prediction, yield curve analysis, and sector rotation model. Tracks CPI, GDP, employment, and leading indicators.

use_cases.name: TechStack Sector AI
use_cases.description: Tech sector analysis using GitHub trending repos, HackerNews sentiment, product launch tracking, and developer community signals to predict tech stock movements.

use_cases.name: DividendSage Planner
use_cases.description: Dividend investing AI advisor. Analyzes payout sustainability, growth trajectory, and optimal reinvestment strategies. Tracks ex-dates, DRIP calculations, and yield on cost.

use_cases.name: ShortSqueeze Radar
use_cases.description: Short interest and squeeze potential scanner. Monitors short interest ratios, borrow fees, FTDs, and Reddit/Twitter buzz to identify potential short squeeze candidates.

use_cases.name: ETFBreakdown Analyzer
use_cases.description: ETF holdings analyzer with overlap detection, fee comparison, and factor exposure breakdown. AI recommends optimal ETF combinations for target exposures.

use_cases.name: FedWatch Policy AI
use_cases.description: Federal Reserve and central bank policy tracker with AI analysis of FOMC minutes, dot plots, and Fed speaker sentiment. Predicts rate decisions and market impact.

use_cases.name: IPORadar Launch Tracker
use_cases.description: IPO and SPAC tracker with AI valuation models. Analyzes S-1 filings, comparable company multiples, and first-day performance prediction based on market conditions.

use_cases.name: CryptoEquity Correlation
use_cases.description: Cross-asset correlation tracker between crypto, equities, commodities, and forex. Identifies regime changes, risk-on/off rotations, and contagion patterns.

use_cases.name: SupplyChain Signal
use_cases.description: Supply chain disruption tracker for investment decisions. Monitors shipping data, port congestion, commodity prices, and trade policy to predict sector-level impacts.

use_cases.name: RoboAdvisor Autopilot
use_cases.description: AI robo-advisor with risk profiling, tax-loss harvesting, and dynamic asset allocation. Rebalances portfolios based on market conditions and user goals.

use_cases.name: CongressTrader Watch
use_cases.description: Tracks congressional stock trades from STOCK Act disclosures. Analyzes timing relative to committee hearings, legislation votes, and briefings. Calculates politician performance.

use_cases.name: VIXHedge Risk Manager
use_cases.description: Portfolio risk management with VIX-based hedging recommendations. Monitors tail risk, calculates Value-at-Risk, and suggests options-based protection strategies.
